prompt: An autumn Tuscan vineyard with orderly rows of grapevines bearing golden leaves and ripe purple grape clusters. A stone wine cellar entrance with a wooden arched door sits on the left side. Rolling hills dotted with cypress trees stretch into the distance under a warm sunset sky. Rich golden-hour light bathes the entire scene. To the right, a wooden grape-pressing cart with large wooden wheels sits beside a stack of harvesting crates at the end of a vine row. Ahead past the cellar, a stone farmhouse with terracotta roof tiles and green shutters overlooks the vineyard. Behind the viewer, a gravel road lined with lavender bushes leads to a wrought-iron gate at the property entrance. First-person viewer. First-person view walking between vineyard rows, with a hand subtly visible reaching forward among the vines, looking toward the cellar entrance and Tuscan hills. No prominently held objects.

tracking_object.desc: stone wine cellar entrance with wooden door on the left

Rich golden-hour light bathes the entire scene.
